author: mathisgd
content: Hey <@968526635735326741>, I see [here](https://github.com/misilva73/evm-gas-repricings/blob/main/reports/gas_repricings_todo.md) that the timelines moved a bit. Are the current numbers close to the final ones, or should we expect big changes?

author: misilva73
content:
Hi, <@581801987495165962>!
Yes, the timelines changed to due delays in benchmarking, specially the state access benchmarks (which will be needed for 8038 and 2780). For those EIPs, we still expect changes. 8038's numbers are all still TBD and 2780 uses current EVM costs and thus will have changes to the state access components. As for the rest of the EIP, 7904 will have some changes after we get the results from BAL-optimized clients, but I don't think the numbers will change a lot. Then, the data EIPs will very likely not change.
